title: zantedeschia aethiopica
intro: Zantedeschia aethiopica, also known as the calla lily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Arum. Native to South Africa, it is known for its elegant white blooms and glossy green leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of calla lily include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the relief of respiratory issues; herbal preparations include teas, infusions, and poultices that can be used topically or internally.
